title: Agent Runtime Coordinator prompt render context
description: Variable-substitution context consumed by scripts/agent/render_agent_prompt.ts when rendering a .agents/prompts/*.md template into .agent_runtime/next_prompt.md. Every property maps 1:1 to a {{variable}} placeholder in the template.

target_state.description: Rendered as {{target_state}}. Uses the literal string "Pending" when next_action.target_state is null.

opusplan.description: Rendered as {{opusplan}}. Boolean next_action.opusplan is rendered as the literal string yes/no.

required_reading_list.description: Rendered as {{required_reading_list}}. A Markdown bullet list, one "- <path>" line per required_reading entry.

forbidden_actions_list.description: Rendered as {{forbidden_actions_list}}. A Markdown bullet list, or "- None." if empty.

expected_outputs_list.description: Rendered as {{expected_outputs_list}}. A Markdown bullet list, or "- None." if empty.
